title: Compare model variants on a cost accuracy frontier
description:
As a Plexus operator, I want to run a procedure against a score with a structured matrix of model and parameter variants, so that I can decide whether a cheaper or more accurate model configuration is worth switching to.

Feature: Model performance frontier

Scenario: Current configuration is included
Given a score has a champion configuration
And the frontier procedure is run with include_current true
When variants are planned
Then the first candidate represents the current champion configuration

Scenario: Deterministic model matrix is evaluated
Given model candidates and parameter sets are supplied
When the frontier procedure runs
Then it creates one de-duplicated candidate per unique model and parameter combination
And every non-current candidate is evaluated with feedback and regression evaluations

Scenario: Frontier artifacts are persisted
Given candidate evaluations complete
When the procedure finalizes
Then it returns rows with metrics, costs, evaluation IDs, and Pareto frontier status
And it persists JSON, CSV, and HTML report attachments with only a compact output envelope inline.
